calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-14-2018 Continued To Apr-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Feder for Karen Newland.

Discussion was held with respect to the Court's concerns regarding putting the heirs rights at risk and Washington law not recognizing heirs of the predeceased spouse. The Court also stated that there is a real problem with the $450,000.00 that goes to a class that may be disinherited by Washington law, questions what protection there would be and stated that it is inclined to make distribution here. The Amended First and Final Account, etc. is continued to April 11, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of and a hearing on an amended petition for distribution under California law.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
